using System;
using System.Collections.Concurrent;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Linq;
using System.Threading;
using System.Threading.Tasks;

// 1. Core Data Model
public sealed class BenchmarkContext
{
    public required string Repository { get; init; }
    public required string Model { get; init; }
    public required IReadOnlyList<string> Constraints { get; init; }
    public double Score(double[] values) => values.Where(double.IsFinite).DefaultIfEmpty(0).Average();
}

public sealed class BenchmarkResult
{
    public BenchmarkContext Context { get; init; } = null!;
    public double Score { get; init; }
    public bool Success { get; init; }
    public string? Error { get; init; }
}

// 2. Execution Engine (Resumable & Serial)
public sealed class BenchmarkRunner : IDisposable
{
    private readonly ConcurrentQueue<BenchmarkContext> _queue = new();
    private readonly ConcurrentDictionary<string, BenchmarkResult> _results = new();
    private readonly SemaphoreSlim _harnessLock = new(1, 1); // Ensures 1 model server at a time
    private readonly CancellationTokenSource _cts = new();
    private readonly string _stateFile = "benchmark_state.json"; // Persistence key

    {
        _queue.Enqueue(context);
    }
